web_results.title: Mavericks Viewed as Contender in 2026 NBA Finals Odds After Landing No. 1 Overall Pick
web_results.description: The Mavs are 12th in the odds to win the Finals at +2200 at DraftKings, ahead of teams like the Los Angeles Clippers, Memphis Grizzlies, Milwaukee Bucks, Detroit Pistons and other playoff squads from ths season.

web_results.title: r/nba on Reddit: Will the Dallas Mavericks be able to win the NBA finals this year?
web_results.description: It all depends on AD’s health, what Kyrie looks like and when he comes back, and just how fast Flagg can adapt to the NBA. Short answer: they’re a play-in team, and depending on their matchups, they could make it far if healthy. ... I think there’s 5 or 6 teams in the west that are better. I’d be impressed if they won a single playoff series ... Best long term outcome is for them to miss the playoffs and hope to jump up in the lottery/land a quality guard and then go into the 2026-2027 season with a fully healthy Kyrie and AD, a young core of Flagg, Lively and a 2026 lottery pick, and quality role players in their prime in PJ Washington, Naji, Christie, Gafford (although I assume Gafford will get traded).
